name: hypermove-app
description: hypermove.dev — make any web3 dApp agent-callable in 3 lines of HTML. Funded under GOAT AI Builder Grants.

_dep_justifications.pg: Node.js Postgres driver. Drives Supabase registry storage at /api/v1/register. Single peer; ~50KB; mature.
_dep_justifications.@next/mdx: Required for /docs/* MDX content. Official Next.js plugin.
_dep_justifications.@testing-library/react: Required for component tests under /tests/components. Industry standard.
